name: Human Likeness And Discriminators
description: Propose a curated evaluation_library addition set for human likeness and discriminators.
related_rules: Human-like quality MUST be operationalized via multi-dimensional rubrics including coherence, continuity, dialogue realism, style consistency, and human-likeness discrimination.
related_validators: Configure evaluators (LLM-judges, discriminators, metrics) to run with greedy decoding and fixed seeds to ensure deterministic behavior.
Periodically re-calibrate automated evaluators against human rubric benchmarks for both narrative and dialogue.
Use regression tests to block deployments where stability improves but agreement with human or reference metrics degrades.
related_failure_modes: Detector overfit to superficial artifacts misclassifies human text as AI or vice versa.
Stability metrics report "stable but wrong" patterns where outputs are consistent yet misaligned with references or human judgment.
